feature: generate_skills API — agent-driven SKILL.md briefing generation
summary: New API endpoint generate_skills() analyses the persisted ArchGraph and produces structured SkillBriefing objects for modules with recurring drift patterns above configurable thresholds. Each briefing contains the module_path, trigger_signals, constraints (from matched ADRs/decisions), hotspot_files, layer, neighbors, and abstractions needed for an AI agent to write a complete .github/skills/<name>/SKILL.md file. The agent_instruction field in the response directs the consuming agent through the briefing data. Exposed as drift.api.generate_skills and drift.arch_graph.SkillBriefing.
design_goals: Produce structured, data-driven briefings instead of prose so agents write reviewable SKILL.md files
Reuse existing ArchGraph without requiring a new scan
Filter by min_occurrences and min_confidence to avoid low-signal briefings
Enrich briefings with matched ADR/decision constraints for accurate guardrails
non_goals: No changes to scoring weights or thresholds
Agent writes the SKILL.md file — this API only provides structured input data

self_analysis.notes: No signal logic changed; generate_skills is an additive API extension on top of ArchGraph.
